description:
Build: The Greeter module gains farewell support: a public method farewell(name: String) -> String on the existing Greeter struct returning exactly "Goodbye, <name>!", and a public method farewell() -> String returning exactly "Goodbye!".
Touches: Greeter · nothing else.
Rules:
1 · farewell(name: "Abbey") returns exactly "Goodbye, Abbey!".
2 · farewell() returns exactly "Goodbye!".
3 · The existing greet(name:) and greet() methods keep their exact current behavior.
Design: no screens change — behavior only.
